scripts.sync:remote-images:refresh: rm -rf images/remote-cache .cache/remote-images-manifest.json site/globals/remote-image-map.json && npm run sync:remote-images:dist
scripts.debug: npm run sync:remote-images && DEBUG=Eleventy* ELEVENTY_ENV=development npx @11ty/eleventy --serve & mix watch
scripts.dev: npm run sync:remote-images && ELEVENTY_ENV=development npx @11ty/eleventy --serve & mix watch & npx netlify-cms-proxy-server
scripts.serve:production: npm run production && npx serve dist -l 58080
